title: Animation Crusher Fixer
description: Small mod that fixes critical bug in non recent forge versions
body:
A small mod that fixes a crushing bug in forge 47.4.0-47.4.5, concerning animation handing code, that is being called from mods made in more recent forge versions (47.4.6+). The fix is simple and when testing it, this mod had no noticable impact on performance or any part of the game.
Mods that were confirmed to trigger this crush and this mod prevents it:
- [Bosses'Rise](https://modrinth.com/mod/bossesrise)
- [Fowl Play](https://modrinth.com/mod/fowlplay)
